title: LegendaryStructures [Cobblemon]
description: Datapack that adds legendary structures to cobblemon so you can capture the legendaries.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28c538446a83fb7cf5a79594fa95f356cba39cd4.png)

## **This is an unofficial port**

**I'm posting since LastGreenSeer seems to have been MIA since September 2024 and wanted to share the updated version (to 1.6.1) of LegendaryStructures I made.**
</details>



This datapack adds 5 new structures with 1 Legendary Pokémon in each one, but you will need to do some type of challange to catch them.

New Legendary Pokémon and how to catch them:

- **Rayquaza**![A photo of the Legendary Pokémon Rayquaza](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bac09ac0582aa1ef8bf90b68b055ddb011cf4e7.png) Rayquaza is found at the top of Sky Pillar, a new rare structure that you can find in desert biomes. After doing a challange parkour you will be able to fight against a level 70 Rayquaza.

- **Articuno**![A photo of the Legendary Pokémon Articuno](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c06cc0ee2d28cc47c8421452dd01975a7f975de3.png)
Articuno is found inside of the Ice Cave, a new rare structure that you can find underneath icy/snowy biomes. After doing a mini quest you will hear a strange roar and have the oppurtunity to fight a level 50 Articuno.

- **Moltres**![A photo of the Legendary Pokémon Moltres](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f785ae987970d90a76ab60aa28f4caa74eaf31aa.png) Moltres is found at the top of Mesa Peak, a new rare structure that you can find in mesa biomes. After doing a mini quest you will hear a strange roar and have the oppurtunity to fight a level 50 Moltres.

- **Zapdos**![A photo of the Legendary Pokémon Zapdos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aeb84c6c12cdd513bc2fda6ef577412d10250e7.png)
Zapdos is found inside of Power Plant, a new rare structure that you can find in swamp biomes. After doing a mini quest you will hear a strange roar and have the oppurtunity to fight a level 50 Zapdos.

- **Mewtwo**![A photo of the Legendary Pokémon Mewtwo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/860af0ad3cf8d0d86a600b28df4495bf6d5eac8a.png)
Mewtwo is found inside of the Team Rocket HQ, a new rare underground structure. After defeating three strong Pokémon, Mewtwo spawns at level 80, so bring your top team!
